Name: Tone Map
Description: Post-processing tone mapping operator that converts high dynamic range (HDR) lighting into displayable low dynamic range (LDR) output while preserving perceptual brightness, contrast, and highlight detail.

Fields.Name: Average Luminance
Fields.Description: Scene-wide average brightness used as a reference for exposure adaptation and overall tone mapping balance.

Fields.Name: Luminance Balance
Fields.Description: Multi-channel weighting factor controlling how different luminance ranges are balanced during tone mapping, affecting midtone and highlight distribution.

Fields.Name: Max Luminance
Fields.Description: Upper bound for scene brightness used in tone mapping, clamping extreme highlights to prevent overexposure and clipping.

Fields.Name: Scaler
Fields.Description: Global exposure scaling factor applied to luminance values before tone mapping, controlling overall image brightness.

Fields.Name: High Brightness Extraction Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold values used to isolate high-intensity pixels for bloom and highlight processing prior to tone mapping compression.
